homepage.title: Christian Wakeford MP
homepage.text_excerpt: Christian Wakeford MP Christian Wakeford MP Home Contact Welcome to my website. Here, you can find my contact details, information about me and some of the things I’ve been up to in Bury South and Parliament. Christian Wakeford Member of Parliament for Bury South I’m passionate about ensuring normal, hard working people have a voice—and that their voice is listened to . All year round, I’m out speaking to residents and meeting with members of our community. Throughout my time in Parliament, I’ve spoken on many issues affecting constituents. I have also spoken to ministerial and Cabinet colleagues, the Prime Minister and a range of civil servants to improve legislation and raise concerns from people in Bury South. I’ve met with a number of campaign groups, religious organisations and community groups in Bury South to help with everything from supporting planning applications, grant funding, to working with Greater Manchester Police and local run groups on women’s safety. My office staff help constituents with a range of issues from help with landlords, council housing, highways, local parks, and signposting to services or charities which offer specialist support. If you have a casework enquiry you would like to raise with my office, please contact me using the details on my contact page. The constituency of Bury South comprises Radcliffe, Prestwich, Whitefield, Kersal and Broughton Park Christian Wakeford MP 0161 533 0801 christian.wakeford.mp@parliament.uk 11 Deansgate, Radcliffe, Manchester, M26 2SH Social media Facebook X Instagram

pages.title: Contact – Christian Wakeford MP
pages.text_excerpt: Contact – Christian Wakeford MP Christian Wakeford MP Home Contact You can contact me in the following ways: Email : christian.wakeford.mp@parliament.uk Telephone : 0161 533 0801 In person or by post : 11 Deansgate, Radcliffe, M26 2SH Calls to my office may be recorded for training and monitoring purposes. Abusive language and behaviour will not be tolerated. When contacting me, please ensure that you have given your full name and postal address . I am only able to respond to queries by constituents of Bury South. Owing to the very large number of emails, letters and phone calls I receive each day, I prioritise constituents with urgent cases, and personalised emails and letters. All other queries will be responded to as soon as possible. Correspondence received to my Westminster office is not regularly monitored. You are more likely to receive a prompt response by contacting my constituency office using the above details. Christian Wakeford MP 0161 533 0801 christian.wakeford.mp@parliament.uk 11 Deansgate, Radcliffe, Manchester, M26 2SH Social media Facebook X Instagram
